category_sources: source_facts.description says Defuddle extracts article content and metadata from web pages; official README describes extracting main content from web pages as HTML or Markdown.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README and repository metadata use the project name Defuddle.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents browser, Node.js, and CLI usage, installation, response fields, bundles, and options.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository, and the official repository page identifies kepano/defuddle.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe extracting article content and metadata, Markdown output, and CLI installation.
